title: EndpointType is reused for both Endpoint.endpointType and MessageAction.actionType
description: The same EndpointType enum is the field type for both Endpoint.endpoint_type and MessageAction.action_type. This is correct because the spec (draft-atwood-jmap-chat-00 §4.3) explicitly states that MessageAction.type uses the same URI namespace as Endpoint.type (urn:jmap:chat:cap:*). A contributor might suggest splitting into two separate enums (EndpointCapabilityType and MessageActionType) for 'clarity', but that would duplicate the enum, its as_uri()/from_uri() logic, and its serde impls for no gain. The spec treats them as the same namespace; the type system should too.
